hero.title: AI-Powered E-Commerce Visual Productivity
hero.subtitle: From product photography to commercial retouching — three core engines covering the entire e-commerce imaging workflow.
hero.platformHint: Compatible with 30+ mainstream domestic and global e-commerce style and size standards.
hero.feature1Desc: AI analyzes product features and selling points to generate high-conversion hero images
hero.feature2Desc: Upload references, AI plans detail page modules and generates a full asset set in one click
hero.feature3Desc: Smart material analysis with batch commercial-grade refinement output

section1.title: Hero Image Generator
section1.subtitle: Upload product images and let AI analyze product traits and selling points to generate high-conversion e-commerce hero images.
section1.cap1Desc: AI auto-detects material, lighting, and texture features for accurate product reproduction
section1.cap2Desc: One-click switching between Taobao, Tmall, JD, Amazon and more platform sizes and styles
section1.cap3Desc: Freely adjust scene style, lighting, composition, color tone, and surface material

section2.title: One-Click Generate
section2.subtitle: Upload multi-angle references and let AI plan detail page modules, then generate a complete e-commerce asset set in one click.
section2.cap1Desc: AI analyzes selling points and auto-plans content layout for each detail page module
section2.cap2Desc: One-click switching between Pinduoduo, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, and Taobao detail page ratios
section2.cap3Desc: Single analysis with concurrent multi-image generation for maximum efficiency

section3.title: Image Refinement
section3.subtitle: One-click smart refinement — AI analyzes product material details and produces commercial-grade retouched results.
section3.cap1Desc: Auto-identifies product materials and detail features for a tailored refinement plan
section3.cap2Desc: Refine up to 50 images at once with one-click output for all results
section3.cap3Desc: Remove blemishes, enhance details, and optimize lighting for professional output

bottomCta.title: Help Brands Boost Shooting & Retouching Efficiency by 10x

aestheticMirror.title: Style Replicate
aestheticMirror.description: Upload a reference image and product assets to replicate the visual style in one click.
aestheticMirror.heroTitle: One-Click Replication of High-Converting Detail Page Styles
aestheticMirror.heroDescription: Upload your preferred design references and product assets. AI intelligently blends style language and product traits to generate conversion-focused detail visuals.
aestheticMirror.referenceCardDesc: Upload a reference image with a clear visual style
aestheticMirror.productDropHint: Upload product elements you want to appear in the output image

featureA.title: Intelligent Style Fusion
featureA.desc: AI extracts and reproduces the design language and visual style of your references.

featureB.title: Product Trait Preservation
featureB.desc: Preserves key product details and selling points while transferring style.

featureC.title: One-Click Generate & Export
featureC.desc: Generate high-resolution visuals quickly and export in multiple sizes.

ecomStudio.title: One-Click Generate Studio
ecomStudio.description: Upload multi-angle references of the same product, choose detail-page modules, let AI build the plan, then generate one image per module.
ecomStudio.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product, audience, key benefits, scene preference, or campaign focus...
ecomStudio.complianceWarning: Amazon compliance warning: some strict main-image rules may still be violated.
ecomStudio.emptyState: Upload reference images of the same product, fill in the brief, choose detail-page modules, and click "Generate Detail Page Plan" to start.

clothingStudio.title: Clothing Studio
clothingStudio.description: Generate three professional clothing variants from a single product image.

refinementStudio.title: One-Click Smart Product Refinement
refinementStudio.description: Upload product images and let AI analyze quality, remove blemishes, and enhance details for more professional product visuals.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.autoRenewA: Yes. It renews automatically based on the selected billing cycle, and you can cancel anytime.
faq.cancelQ: Will it stop immediately after cancellation?
faq.cancelA: No. Your subscription stays active until the current billing period ends.
faq.expiryA: One-time purchase credits never expire. Subscription bonus credits follow platform rules.
